name: Simplilearn
overview_text: Simplilearn is an online learning platform that offers courses, training programs, and certifications in areas such as data science, artificial intelligence, cloud computing, and more.
headquarters_address: Simplilearn Inc., USA Headquarters,  101 S. Capitol Avenue, STE 200, Indianapolis, IN 46225
history_timeline: [{'year': 2010, 'description': 'Founded as Simplilearn Inc.'}, {'year': 2013, 'description': 'Raised $10 million in Series A funding from Helion Venture Partners'}]

core_value_proposition: {'key': 'Quality Education', 'description': 'Simplilearn provides high-quality education that is applicable in real-world scenarios.'}

weaknesses_gaps: ['Limited physical locations', 'Competitors with stronger brand recognition']

description: Simplilearn is an online learning platform that offers courses, training programs, and certifications in areas such as data science, artificial intelligence, cloud computing, and more.
vision_statement: To empower a billion professionals by 2025 with the right skill sets to succeed in the digital economy.
mission_statement: Simplilearn's mission is to make learning easy, affordable, and accessible for professionals across the globe.
sales_motion: Simplilearn's sales motion focuses on building strong relationships with clients, understanding their needs, and providing personalized solutions.
ethical_sourcing: Yes, Simplilearn sources materials and labor from suppliers who adhere to strict ethical standards.
benchmark_vs_peers: Simplilearn's revenue growth rate is 30% higher than its peers in the online learning industry.

case_studies.title: Upskilling Employees at IBM
case_studies.description: Simplilearn helped IBM upskill its employees in emerging technologies like AI and cloud computing.

case_studies.title: Digital Transformation at Bosch
case_studies.description: Simplilearn partnered with Bosch to transform its workforce with digital skills and technologies.
